seeds.title: Erdos q(6): minimum edges in a 6-uniform intersecting hypergraph with cover number 6
seeds.query: q(6) minimum edges 6-uniform pairwise-intersecting hypergraph cover number six exact witness verifier 5-cover rejection SAT DRAT bracket
seeds.falsifier: A proposed witness has two disjoint edges or admits a hitting set of size at most 5; an optimality claim lacks a complete independently checkable nonexistence certificate.
seeds.next_action: Build the exact witness verifier first, including known-good and known-bad fixtures. Then inventory authoritative q(5) or q(6) seeds and define one bounded m-cell experiment; do not claim optimality without a complete certificate.
seeds.avoid: Do not launch a broad hypergraph search, claim q(6), or spend heavy SAT compute before the witness verifier, kill fixtures, encoding manifest, and bounded cell are exact. No Atlas writes or external submissions.
